claims.statement: Channel Tunnel length is at least 3× larger than Panama Canal length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km. Panama Canal length: 82 km.

claims.statement: Cheetah sprint is slower than Category 5 hurricane threshold.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Cheetah sprint: 120 km/h. Category 5 hurricane threshold: 252 km/h.

claims.statement: Channel Tunnel length is at least 4× longer than Great Barrier Reef length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km. Great Barrier Reef length: 2300 km.

claims.statement: There are fewer keys on a standard piano than grams in a kilogram.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 88 keys vs 1,000 g.

claims.statement: First powered flight happened before First iPhone released.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. First powered flight: 1903. First iPhone released: 2007.
